title: BEM-548.6 dashboard v2 final
objective:
Run script:
"""
reports = Path('governance/reports')
reports.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
proofs.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
protocols = Path('governance/protocols')
protocols.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
state_path = Path('governance/state/contour_status.json')
role_state_path = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
provider_state_path = Path('governance/state/provider_contour_state.json')
pending = Path('governance/tasks/pending/BEM548_NEXT_DEVELOPMENT_ROADMAP_FOR_APPROVAL.md')
done = Path('governance/tasks/done/BEM548_NEXT_DEVELOPMENT_ROADMAP_APPROVED_DONE.md')
done.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

schema = protocols / 'CONTOUR_STATUS_SCHEMA_V2.md'
schema.write_text('# BEM-548.6 | Contour Status Schema v2\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 15:10 (UTC+3)\n\n## Назначение\nЕдиный machine-readable dashboard для внешнего GPT, Claude и Telegram.\n\n## Required sections\n| Field | Meaning |\n|---|---|\n| schema_version | contour_status.v2 |\n| updated_at | UTC+3 timestamp |\n| roadmap | current roadmap progress |\n| external_contour | GPT/Claude/Telegram status |\n| internal_contour | curator/orchestrator/roles status |\n| provider_contour | primary/reserve provider status |\n| telegram | outbox/live delivery status |\n| blockers | current blockers list |\n| evidence | key SHA and report paths |\n')

# scan transport summary
counts = {}
sent_count = 0
delivery_count = 0
if transport.exists():
    for line in transport.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines():
        if not line.strip():
            continue
        try:
            rec = json.loads(line)
        except Exception:
            continue
        rt = rec.get('record_type')
        counts[rt] = counts.get(rt, 0) + 1
        if rt == 'telegram_delivery_result':
            delivery_count += 1
            if rec.get('status') == 'sent':
                sent_count += 1

role_state = json.loads(role_state_path.read_text(errors='ignore')) if role_state_path.exists() else {}
provider_state = json.loads(provider_state_path.read_text(errors='ignore')) if provider_state_path.exists() else {}

status = {
  'schema_version':'contour_status.v2',
  'updated_at':'2026-05-17 | 15:10 (UTC+3)',
  'roadmap':{
    'id':'BEM-548',
    'title':'Next Development Roadmap approved by Claude',
    'status':'completed',
    'stages_total':7,
    'stages_completed':7,
    'progress_percent':100,
    'stages':{
      'BEM-548.0':'completed',
      'BEM-548.1':'completed',
      'BEM-548.2':'completed_with_yaml_fix',
      'BEM-548.3':'completed',
      'BEM-548.4':'completed_technical_outbox_ready',
      'BEM-548.5a':'completed_synthetic_regression',
      'BEM-548.5b':'completed_live_observed_stale_queue_fixed',
      'BEM-548.6':'completed_dashboard_v2'
    }
  },
  'external_contour':{
    'gpt':'active',
    'claude':'external_auditor_approved_bem548_with_edits',
    'telegram':'live_delivery_observed_by_operator_screenshot'
  },
  'internal_contour':{
    'curator':'entrypoint_only',
    'role_orchestrator':'workflow_yaml_fixed_and_script_backed',
    'roles_sequence':'curator -> role_orchestrator -> analyst -> auditor -> executor -> auditor_final -> curator_closure',
    'role_state_status': role_state.get('curator_status')
  },
  'provider_contour':{
    'primary':'claude',
    'reserve':'gpt',
    'probe_before_reserve_required':True,
    'selected_provider':provider_state.get('selected_provider'),
    'reserve_used':provider_state.get('reserve_used'),
    'blocker':provider_state.get('blocker')
  },
  'telegram':{
    'workflow':'.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml',
    'picker':'scripts/telegram_outbox_pick.py',
    'delivery_records_count':delivery_count,
    'sent_records_count':sent_count,
    'operator_live_observed':True,
    'stale_queue_fixed':True
  },
  'blockers':[],
  'evidence':{
    'BEM-548.0':'29cc45baf496df18cb668480b5260789eb290915',
    'BEM-548.1':'0c4ed6dd1f66c62d6fae769d36043b1b0c6c1e50',
    'BEM-548.2':'cc936b16dcca40276a7255da70c1ed905ff2e61e',
    'BEM-548.2_FIX':'3f71cbf19fbd47bad876d33f1d3509f1c95c8e1e',
    'BEM-548.3':'2b5bd2567788bb6092bac756cdfd884768956ed8',
    'BEM-548.4':'5c8679139aa2832036f81e421144fc0d65e24859',
    'BEM-548.5a':'8807cb850fc2ef428e580c2b49e55531d74a1055',
    'BEM-548.5b':'080069abab9ced9ae4c9f18b753314a95a845673',
    'BEM-548.6':'this_commit',
    'reports':['governance/reports/bem548_5a_synthetic_regression.md','governance/reports/bem548_5b_live_regression_telegram.md','governance/reports/bem548_6_dashboard_v2_final.md']
  },
  'transport_record_counts':counts,
  'blocker':None
}
state_path.write_text(json.dumps(status, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

record = {'record_type':'contour_status_dashboard_v2_final','cycle_id':'bem548-6-dashboard-v2','source':'gpt','status':'completed','schema_version':'contour_status.v2','artifact_path':'governance/state/contour_status.json','commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 15:10 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

pending_text = pending.read_text(errors='ignore') if pending.exists() else '# BEM-548 Roadmap\n'
done.write_text(pending_text + '\n\n---\n\n## Result\nBEM-548 completed 7/7. Dashboard v2 created.\n\nEvidence:\n- BEM-548.0: 29cc45baf496df18cb668480b5260789eb290915\n- BEM-548.1: 0c4ed6dd1f66c62d6fae769d36043b1b0c6c1e50\n- BEM-548.2: cc936b16dcca40276a7255da70c1ed905ff2e61e\n- BEM-548.2 fix: 3f71cbf19fbd47bad876d33f1d3509f1c95c8e1e\n- BEM-548.3: 2b5bd2567788bb6092bac756cdfd884768956ed8\n- BEM-548.4: 5c8679139aa2832036f81e421144fc0d65e24859\n- BEM-548.5a: 8807cb850fc2ef428e580c2b49e55531d74a1055\n- BEM-548.5b: 080069abab9ced9ae4c9f18b753314a95a845673\n- BEM-548.6: final commit\n\nBlocker: null\n')
if pending.exists():
    pending.unlink()
    changed_files.append(str(pending))

report = reports / 'bem548_6_dashboard_v2_final.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-548.6 | Monitoring/State Dashboard v2 | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 15:10 (UTC+3)\n\n## Выполнено\n- Создан `governance/protocols/CONTOUR_STATUS_SCHEMA_V2.md`.\n- `governance/state/contour_status.json` переведён в schema `contour_status.v2`.\n- BEM-548 закрыт 7/7.\n\n## Dashboard sections\n| Наименование | Описание | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|\n| roadmap | BEM-548 completed 7/7 | contour_status.json |\n| external_contour | GPT/Claude/Telegram statuses | schema v2 |\n| internal_contour | curator/orchestrator/roles status | schema v2 |\n| provider_contour | Claude primary, GPT reserve, probe required | schema v2 |\n| telegram | live observed, stale queue fixed | schema v2 |\n| blockers | empty | blocker=null |\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')
proof = proofs / 'bem548_6_dashboard_v2_final.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-548.6 PASS: contour_status v2 dashboard created, roadmap BEM-548 completed 7/7.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(schema), str(state_path), str(transport), str(done), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-548.6 dashboard v2 completed and BEM-548 roadmap closed')
"""
